title: DonutEconomy
description: Easy to use Economy Plugin Folia Support
body:
DonutEconomy Folia-Ready Economy Solution

Overview
DonutEconomy is a high-performance economy solution designed for Folia and Paper servers. It provides a fast and reliable money system inspired by modern SMP servers.

Key Features
Optimized for Folia using multi-threaded logic to ensure zero lag.
Full Vault Integration for compatibility with all major shop and claim plugins.
Smart Formatting for large numbers like 1.5M or 500K.
Fully Customizable messages and prefixes via config.yml with MiniMessage support.
Async Baltop leaderboard for the top 10 richest players without TPS drops.
Safe Data Handling with asynchronous saving to prevent data loss.

Requirements
Software Paper or Folia Version 1.21 plus
Dependency Vault
Java Version 21

Commands and Permissions
/balance - Check your own balance - No permission required
/pay player amount - Send money to another player - No permission required
/baltop - Show the richest players - No permission required
/eco set give take - Manage player funds - Permission donuteco.admin

Installation
1. Download the DonutEconomy jar file.
2. Ensure Vault is installed on your server.
3. Place the jar in your plugins folder.
4. Restart your server.

Support
For bugs or feature requests use the discussion tab or contact support. Please leave a review if you find the plugin helpful.
